category: Core Mechanical Components of a Clock
explanation: Gears, Springs, Pendulum, and Escapement are all essential internal mechanical components that enable a traditional clock to function and keep time. The Dial is an external display component, not part of the internal timekeeping mechanism itself.

category: Major Civilizations of the Ancient Near East
explanation: The Ancient Egyptians, Sumerians, Babylonians, and Assyrians were all prominent civilizations that flourished in the Ancient Near East. The Incas, however, were a pre-Columbian civilization from South America.

Second, Meter, Kilogram, and Ampere are four of the seven fundamental base units in the International System of Units (SI). Liter is a derived unit of volume (equivalent to a cubic decimeter), not a base unit.
